fields.name: query
fields.comment: The user's current message

fields.name: chatHistory
fields.comment: Previous conversation messages

fields.name: request
fields.comment: The current procurement request being viewed by the user

fields.name: agentResponse
fields.comment: Combined response: agent text + per-item feedback list

fields.name: today
fields.comment: Today's date as ISO string

fields.name: formattedHistory
fields.comment: Chat history joined as a single string for the system prompt

fields.name: formattedRequest
fields.comment: Formatted summary of the current request for the system prompt

fields.name: question
fields.comment: The procurement question forwarded to the answerProcurementQuestion tool

fields.name: knowledgeContext
fields.comment: Knowledge base content loaded from CMS

fields.name: toolAnswer
fields.comment: Plain-text answer from the answerProcurementQuestion inner agent

fields.name: inventoryItem
fields.comment: Inventory record for the current material item (analyzeRequest loop)

fields.name: count
fields.comment: Loop counter for analyzeRequest

fields.name: agentFeedbackList
fields.comment: Accumulated per-item feedback from analyzeRequest

fields.name: materialItem
fields.comment: Current material item being evaluated in the analyzeRequest loop

fields.name: agentFeedback
fields.comment: Feedback for the current item from the evaluator agent

fields.name: inventoryItems
fields.comment: Inventory items returned by findAlternativeItems tool

fields.name: troubleItems
fields.comment: Subset of material items flagged with hasTrouble, collected at the start of the findAlternativeItems loop

fields.name: rankedAnalysis
fields.comment: Structured ranked analysis of alternative inventory items produced before the final selection agent

fields.name: command
fields.comment: Modification instruction from the user for the modifyRequest tool

fields.name: modifiedRequest
fields.comment: Updated request produced by the Modify Request Agent

fields.name: userLanguage
fields.comment: Display name of the session user's locale language in English (e.g. 'Japanese', 'German')

fields.name: textToTranslate
fields.comment: Combined text for translation: agentResponse.result and all feedback messages joined by ---SEG--- separators

fields.name: translatedResult
fields.comment: Translated combined text returned by the translation agent; split on ---SEG--- to restore individual segments

fields.name: feedbacks
fields.comment: Input feedbacks list for applyFeedbackReplacements tool (from a previous findAlternativeItems response)

fields.name: matchedFeedback
fields.comment: Feedback entry matched to the current trouble item in the applyFeedbackReplacements loop
